Battlefield Guide:
The Demonic Sword Zariche and the Blood Sword Akamanah appear when a monster or PC above level 95 dies on the field every Monday thru Thursday between 18:00-23:59.
If you die, the Treasure Chest gets destroyed, or if you don't get blood on the sword at least once in 2 hours (PK) while you possess the Cursed Sword, it will disappear.
